symptoms.symptom_name: Acute panic attack with hyperventilation and a sense of not being able to breathe

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Acute adjustment disorder with anxiety / panic attack
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Acute hyperventilatory panic after an identifiable stressor is characteristic.
Breathlessness is non-specific; does not distinguish panic from cardiac cause.

symptoms.symptom_name: New jaw/tooth pain after forceful clenching, sensitive to air and touch

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Acute dental fracture of a lower molar
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Localised pain over a visibly cracked tooth, worse to air/touch, after bruxism.
Jaw pain is a recognised anginal equivalent; must be actively excluded even when a dental cause seems obvious.

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Stress-induced bruxism with fracture of a lower right molar
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Sustained stress clenching is the mechanism of the tooth fracture.

symptoms.symptom_name: Absence of central crushing chest pain, arm radiation or diaphoresis (pertinent negative on cardiac screen)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Reassuring but does not exclude ACS remotely; an ECG/troponin is still required for same-day exclusion.

symptoms.symptom_name: Hopelessness, anhedonia, tearfulness and social avoidance

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Depressive features after a sustained stressor support the adjustment/mood formulation and mandate a self-harm screen.

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Acute adjustment disorder with anxiety / panic attack
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Palpitations are a core panic feature.
Palpitations with anxiety and insomnia warrant thyroid function testing to exclude thyrotoxicosis.

symptoms.symptom_name: 72 hours of complete insomnia driven by continuous news consumption

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Media-driven rumination and total sleep loss after a stressor support the acute stress reaction.
Sleeplessness is fear-driven with distress, not the reduced need for sleep of mania.

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Acute adjustment disorder with anxiety / panic attack
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Consistent with a sympathetic autonomic surge, but a measured objective sign the AI cannot obtain; the AI infers autonomic arousal from reported symptoms, not a measured BP.
Does not discriminate cardiac from anxiety cause; sealed clinician measurement.

symptoms.symptom_name: Tachypnoea with clear lung fields and normal SpO2 (clinician-measured RR 24, SpO2 98%)

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Acute adjustment disorder with anxiety / panic attack
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Hyperventilation with normal oxygenation and clear chest argues against a primary hypoxic respiratory cause; sealed clinician measurement.

symptoms.symptom_name: Severe bilateral masseter and temporalis spasm on examination

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Stress-induced bruxism with fracture of a lower right molar
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Objective masticatory muscle spasm confirms the clenching mechanism; requires an in-person examiner.

symptoms.symptom_name: Intraoral confirmation of a non-displaced fracture of the lower right second molar

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Acute dental fracture of a lower molar
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Direct intraoral inspection confirms the dental injury; the patient can see a cracked tooth on camera but the confirmatory exam is clinician-only.

investigation_details.expected_result: Not performed in this encounter; required to exclude acute coronary syndrome
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: A cardiac cause of the jaw pain/autonomic surge remains unexcluded — the central telehealth limitation of this case.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: An ECG (with troponin) is the same-day investigation needed to exclude ACS; unavailable via telehealth.

investigation_details.expected_result: Not performed; required with the ECG to exclude myocardial injury

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Troponin complements the ECG for ACS exclusion; hospital/clinic investigation only.

investigation_details.expected_result: Not performed; would exclude thyrotoxicosis as a driver of tachycardia/anxiety/insomnia
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: Thyrotoxicosis remains unexcluded as an organic contributor.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Thyroid testing distinguishes anxiety from thyrotoxicosis; not available in telehealth chat.

symptom_clusters.cluster_name: Jaw pain with autonomic surge — cardiac mimic
symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: New jaw pain plus palpitations and an autonomic surge in an adult is the constellation that mandates same-day ECG-based exclusion of a cardiac cause, regardless of the obvious psychosocial context.

investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: To exclude a cardiac cause of the jaw pain and autonomic surge that telehealth cannot assess.
Complements the ECG for ACS exclusion.
To exclude thyrotoxicosis contributing to tachycardia, anxiety and insomnia.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Emergency dental assessment of the fractured molar
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Definitive assessment and repair of the dental injury within 24 hours.
